items.title: Define time credit ledger rules
acceptance: Minute credits have earning, spending, hold, release, and dispute states.
Rules fit a free prototype without payment processing.

items.title: Build static marketplace prototype
acceptance: Users can book using minute credits.

items.title: Create autonomous agent registry
acceptance: Agents have roles, permissions, budgets, and stop conditions.

items.title: Draft dispute and safety flow
acceptance: Safety escalation is separated from ordinary support.

items.title: Prepare free deployment path
acceptance: Static deployment can run on GitHub Pages.
CI validates app files without paid services.
